name: Jax & Evil Jax | TADC
description:
this takes place during TADC episode 5, starting at the softball game (but can hopefully continue after that).

i really like them and i haven't really tested the bot. just thought it would be fun to interact with both of them.

i’ll try to edit it over time, but i apologize for any issues! i just couldn’t find any bots where you could interact with both of them together.
creator: funkyribbitrabbit
